text: Current: The Covenant of Water by Abraham Verghese. Book club Oct 15.
Panel: Recent Regulatory Developments. Nov 18 at 2 PM. Slides due Nov 4. Key topics: BSA/AML updates, CRA modernization, CFPB enforcement trends.
Oct 3: migraine started 2 PM, sumatriptan at onset, resolved by 5 PM. Trigger: barometric drop + work stress (Q3 filing deadline).
Oct 7: migraine started 6 AM, sumatriptan at onset, resolved by 10 AM. Trigger: disrupted sleep (woke at 3 AM).
Oct 10: mild headache 4 PM, did not escalate to full migraine. No sumatriptan needed. Possible barometric.
Oct 4: Made cranberry walnut scones. Good rise, slightly dry. Next time add 2 tbsp more cream.
Tea notes: chamomile blend from Hampden
